query: SELECT e.id as estab_id, e.userId, e.name as estab_name, u.id as user_id, u.email, u.openId, u.loginMethod, u.name as user_name FROM establishments e LEFT JOIN users u ON e.userId = u.id WHERE e.id = 210008;
